title: Vitality
description: Adds a diet system with movement buffs.
body: ## Showcase: ## Description: Vitality is a mod that adds a diet system to Minecraft. Its main goal is to encourage players to consume healthy foods, such as carrots, apples, and beetroot. If you have eaten a healthy food item recently, you will gain extra movement abilities: **Double Jumping**, **Wall Jumping**, and **Soft Landing**. If you haven't eaten a healthy food item in a while, you will be at risk of having the weakness status effect. Additionally, when improving your diet to 'Good', you will briefly gain regeneration. ## Controls **Double Jump**: Press space while mid-air. Holding crouch will also increase the height of the double jump. **Wall Jump**: Face a wall, crouch, and release. **Soft Landing**: Press or hold space shortly before landing on the ground to roll gracefully. This will negate fall damage from heights of 7 blocks or fewer. Any fall damage taken from greater heights will only be slightly reduced. ## Configuration: There are a few configuration options available to customize the experience. - `allowWallJump` enables/disables wall jumping for all players (Default: True) - `allowDoubleJump` enables/disables double jumping for all players (Default: True) - `allowSoftLand` enables/disables soft landing for all players (Default: True) - `improveDietRegeneration` enables/disables the regeneration effect given when a player improves their diet (Default: True) - `healthyEatingWindow` controls how many non-healthy foods can be eaten before your diet reaches "Bad" or 0%. (Default: 10) There is also a `#vitality:healthy` item tag that can be used to make different foods considered healthy. By default, the available healthy foods are: - Apples - Beetroots - Beetroot Soup - Carrots - Glow Berries - Melon Slices - Rabbit Stew - Sweet Berries - Healthy Stew ([Genesis](https://modrinth.com/mod/genesis-official)) - Baked Cod Stew ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Cabbage ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Cabbage Leaf ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Cabbage Rolls ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Chicken Soup ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Dumplings ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Fish Stew ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Fruit Salad ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Grilled Salmon ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Kelp Roll ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Kelp Roll Slice ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Mixed Salad ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Mushroom Rice ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Onion ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Pumpkin Slice ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Pumpkin Soup ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Ratatouille ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Tomato ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Tomato Sauce ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Vegetable Noodles ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)) - Vegetable Soup ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated))
